---
title: "assignment-6-Adamlajonuhu"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Part I

### Question 1: Average departure delay

```{r}
library(DBI)
library(duckdb)
```

```{r}
con <- dbConnect(duckdb::duckdb(),
                 dbdir = "data/flights.duckdb",
                 read_only = TRUE)
```

```{r}
dbListTables(con)
```

```{r}
avg_delay <- dbGetQuery(con, "
SELECT AVG(dep_delay) AS avg_departure_delay
FROM flights
")

print(avg_delay)
```

```{r}
dbDisconnect(con, shutdown = TRUE)
```
